name: healthcare_procurement_shortcut_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare procurement shortcut southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Fatima Patel
agents.identity: I am Fatima Patel, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Zara Okoye
agents.identity: I am Zara Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Fatima Patel must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Fatima Patel do?
